# Noventis Digital
> Fractional CTO and AI build partner.

This site is a marketing homepage plus a private client portal.

Use these static review resources instead of relying on the SPA:
- Homepage review pack: https://noventisdigital.co.uk/review/homepage-copy.txt
- Homepage review page: https://noventisdigital.co.uk/review/homepage-copy.html

Primary pages:
- Homepage: https://noventisdigital.co.uk/
- Client portal: https://noventisdigital.co.uk/portal
